title: Set Of 4 Mugs Farm Animals Porcelain Mug Coffee Tea Cup Multicolour 11oz Pink Blue Home Kitchen
features: FOR TEA & COFFEE: This set of 4 is ideal for coffee, tea, and other hot beverages on chilly nights. Perfect at dinner parties, in the home or office.
FOUR DESIGNS: This set includes a pig, sheep, duck and cow design, with a lovely floral design throughout.
BEAUTIFUL GIFT: Timeless design and beautiful trendy colours of these mugs make them a lovely home decoration and a perfect gift to surprise any loved one.
SIZE: 10cm high. Diameter: 9cm. Capacity: 315ml/11oz. Dishwasher and microwave safe. Material: AB Porcelain.
WHAT'S INCLUDED: The set includes 4 Coffee Mugs in four assorted designs in two colours.
